name: Pumpkin Bars #1 - Fruit Sweet
recipeIngredient: It is made of peach and pear juices & pineapple syrup.
It is available from: Wax Orchards, R4 - 320, Vashon Island, WA 98070.
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Spray a 9 x 13" pan with Pam.
1. Combine butter, Fruit Sweet, and mashed banana in a bowl.
2. Beat in egg, pumpkin, and vanilla extract.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, baking soda, allspice, cinnamon, and ginger.
4. Stir the dry ingredients into the pumpkin mixture until combined.
5. Add raisins and chopped nuts to the batter; stir gently.
6. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until firm in the center.
8. Make topping by combining orange juice concentrate, Fruit Sweet, orange rind, and vanilla extract.
9. Spread the topping over warm bars before serving.
